notifications.battery_hint: To keep receiving messages when the app is in the background, allow notifications and exempt Najva from battery optimization in your device settings.

settings.changePasswordDesc: Re-enter your current password to re-encrypt your keys under a new one.
settings.passwordChanged: Your password was changed. Other sessions have been signed out.
settings.regenerateDesc: This invalidates all of your existing recovery codes and issues a new set.
settings.passkeysDesc: Sign in without a password using your device's biometrics or a security key. A recovery-ready passkey can also restore access to your encrypted messages.
settings.passkeyRecoveryReadyHint: Can restore access to your encrypted message history.
settings.passkeySignInOnlyHint: Signs you in, but cannot recover your message history.
settings.addPasskeyDesc: Give this passkey a name, then follow your device's prompt to create it.
settings.passkeyAdded: Passkey added. You can now sign in and recover with it.
settings.passkeyAddedNoPrf: Passkey added. This device's authenticator can't protect your keys, so this passkey signs you in but cannot recover your encrypted message history.
settings.passkeyAddFailed: Could not add a passkey. Please try again.
settings.passkeyNoKey: Couldn't access your encryption key on this device. Sign in again with your password, then add a passkey.
settings.deletePasskeyDesc: Enter your password to remove this passkey. You won't be able to sign in or recover with it anymore.
settings.passkeyDeleteFailed: Could not remove the passkey. Please try again.
settings.title: Settings

errors.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please try again later.

auth.passkeyLoginFailed: Passkey sign-in failed. Please try again or use your password.
auth.passkeyNeedsPassword: Signed in with your passkey, but your messages stay locked on this device. Sign in with your password once to unlock them.
auth.register_subtitle: Sign up to start using Najva
auth.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
auth.no_account_found: No account found with that username.
auth.fill_fields: Please enter your email and password.

reg.title: Create your account
reg.sub_4: Step 3 of 3 — save your recovery keys
reg.user_hint: Letters, numbers and underscores · at least 3 characters
reg.ack: I understand that without these codes, regaining access to my account will be difficult.
reg.done_sub: Your account is ready to use.
reg.err_short: Username must be at least 3 characters.
reg.err_chars: Only letters, numbers and underscores, please.
reg.err_pass: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reg.display_ph: Shown to others · defaults to your username

rec.menu_sub: Choose how you want to verify your identity
rec.rkey_sub: Enter one of your saved recovery keys
rec.passkey_sub: Use your saved passkey to verify
rec.reset_sub: Set a new password for your account
rec.opt_device_sub: Get a verification code on a device where you're signed in
rec.opt_rkey_sub: Use one of the recovery codes you saved at sign-up
rec.code_note: A verification code has been sent to your other device. Enter the code.
rec.rkey_lbl: Enter one of your recovery keys
rec.rkey_hint: Each recovery key can be used once, e.g. K7NR-2WPX
rec.pk_sub: Confirm with your device's fingerprint, face or PIN
rec.err_rkey: That doesn't look like a recovery key.
rec.err_pass: Password must be at least 8 characters.
rec.err_approve: Approve this reset on your other device first.
rec.err_passkey: This passkey cannot unlock your messages.
rec.err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
rec.username_sub: We’ll use it to find your account

sessions.title: Active Sessions
sessions.description: Devices currently signed in to your account. Revoke any you don't recognize.

presence.longTimeAgo: last seen a long time ago

profile.confirmBlock: Are you sure you want to block this user?
profile.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete this chat?
profile.title: User Info

twofa.title: Two-Step Verification
twofa.scanQr: Scan this QR code with Google Authenticator

recovery.title: Recovery Codes
recovery.warning: Save these codes somewhere safe. Without them, a forgotten password may permanently lock you out of your account.

forgot.title: Reset Password
forgot.waiting: We sent a verification code to your other logged-in devices. Enter it below.
forgot.step1Desc: Enter your username to begin the password reset process.
forgot.step2Desc: How would you like to recover your account?
forgot.methodRecoveryKeyDesc: Use one of your saved backup codes from registration.
forgot.methodPasskeyDesc: Use a registered passkey to recover your account.
forgot.passkeyRecoverFailed: Passkey recovery failed. This passkey may not support account recovery.
forgot.passkeyNoPrf: This passkey can sign you in but cannot recover your message history.
forgot.methodOtherDeviceDesc: Receive a 6-digit code on a device already logged in.
forgot.checkOtherDevice: Check your other device for the verification code.
forgot.step4Desc: Create a strong new password for your account.
forgot.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
forgot.methodLostDesc: Last resort — old messages are lost
forgot.waitForApproval: Approve this reset on your other device first.
forgot.fingerprintHint: Check that these words match the ones shown on your other device before approving:
forgot.waitingApproval: Waiting for approval on your other device…
forgot.approvedEnterOtp: Approved. Enter the code shown on your other device.
forgot.resetExpired: This request expired or was denied. Go back and try again.
forgot.sealOpenFailed: Could not open the approved key. Check the fingerprint match and try again.
forgot.lostWarnTitle: Your old messages will be lost forever
forgot.lostWarnBody: Because your messages are end-to-end encrypted, no one — not even support — can read them without your keys. This path builds brand-new keys, so every message and file from before now becomes permanently unreadable. Only use it if you have lost your password, recovery codes, passkeys, and any signed-in device.
forgot.authTokenPlaceholder: Paste the code support gave you
forgot.enterAuthToken: Enter the authorization code from support.
forgot.lostAck: I understand my old messages will be permanently unreadable.
forgot.mustAcknowledge: You must acknowledge that old messages will be lost.

resetApproval.title: Approve a password reset?
resetApproval.body: A password reset was requested from {{device}}. Only approve if this was you.
resetApproval.fingerprintHint: Confirm these words match the ones on the other device:
resetApproval.noKey: This device can't access your encryption key. Approve from a device where you're fully signed in.
resetApproval.failed: Could not approve the reset. Please try again.

historyLost.banner: Your account was recovered from scratch. Messages and files from before the recovery are permanently unreadable.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.forbidden: You do not have administrator access.
admin.authorizeWarn: This issues a one-time token so {{name}} can rebuild their encryption identity from scratch. This is irreversible: all of their existing message history becomes permanently unreadable, and their conversations will be re-keyed.
admin.tokenHint: Give this one-time token to the user through a verified channel. It expires shortly and can be used once.
